ns0:entry.ns0:title: Automattic/jetpack
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Automattic/jetpack
Language: php
Security, performance, marketing, and design tools — Jetpack is made by WordPress experts to make WP sites safer and faster, and help you grow your traffic.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Leantime/leantime
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Leantime/leantime
Language: php
Leantime is a goals focused project management system for non-project managers. Building with ADHD, Autism, and dyslexia in mind.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: PHPOffice/PhpSpreadsheet
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/PHPOffice/PhpSpreadsheet
Language: php
A pure PHP library for reading and writing spreadsheet files

ns0:entry.ns0:title: WordPress/wordpress-develop
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/WordPress/wordpress-develop
Language: php
WordPress Develop, Git-ified. Synced from git://develop.git.wordpress.org/, including branches and tags! This repository is just a mirror of the WordPress subversion repository. Please include a link to a pre-existing ticket on https://core.trac.wordpress.org/ with every pull request.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: danielmiessler/SecLists
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/danielmiessler/SecLists
Language: php
SecLists is the security tester's companion. It's a collection of multiple types of lists used during security assessments, collected in one place. List types include usernames, passwords, URLs, sensitive data patterns, fuzzing payloads, web shells, and many more.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: digininja/DVWA
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/digininja/DVWA
Language: php
Damn Vulnerable Web Application (DVWA)

ns0:entry.ns0:title: drush-ops/drush
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/drush-ops/drush
Language: php
Drush is a command-line shell and scripting interface for Drupal, a veritable Swiss Army knife designed to make life easier for those who spend their working hours hacking away at the command prompt.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: firefly-iii/firefly-iii
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/firefly-iii/firefly-iii
Language: php
Firefly III: a personal finances manager

ns0:entry.ns0:title: freescout-help-desk/freescout
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/freescout-help-desk/freescout
Language: php
FreeScout — Free self-hosted help desk & shared mailbox (Zendesk / Help Scout alternative)

ns0:entry.ns0:title: grokability/snipe-it
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/grokability/snipe-it
Language: php
A free open source IT asset/license management system

ns0:entry.ns0:title: kimai/kimai
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/kimai/kimai
Language: php
Kimai is the #1 open-source time-tracking application. From freelancers to companies and organisations - everyone can manage timesheets, generate reports, create invoices and so much more... Web-based multi-user application, available as On-Premise or SaaS version: https://www.kimai.org

ns0:entry.ns0:title: laravel/ai
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/laravel/ai
Language: php
The Laravel AI SDK provides a unified, expressive API for interacting with AI providers such as OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, and more.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: magento/magento2
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/magento/magento2
Language: php
Prior to making any Submission(s), you must sign an Adobe Contributor License Agreement, available here at: https://opensource.adobe.com/cla.html. All Submissions you make to Adobe Inc. and its affiliates, assigns and subsidiaries (collectively “Adobe”) are subject to the terms of the Adobe Contributor License Agreement.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: matomo-org/matomo
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/matomo-org/matomo
Language: php
Empowering People Ethically 🚀 — Matomo is hiring! Join us → https://matomo.org/jobs Matomo is the leading open-source alternative to Google Analytics, giving you complete control and built-in privacy. Easily collect, visualise, and analyse data from websites & apps. Star us on GitHub ⭐️ – Pull Requests welcome!

ns0:entry.ns0:title: nextcloud/all-in-one
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/nextcloud/all-in-one
Language: php
📦 The official Nextcloud installation method. Provides easy deployment and maintenance with most features included in this one Nextcloud instance.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: openemr/openemr
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/openemr/openemr
Language: php
The most popular open source electronic health records and medical practice management solution.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: opnsense/plugins
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/opnsense/plugins
Language: php
OPNsense plugin collection

ns0:entry.ns0:title: pmmp/PocketMine-MP
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/pmmp/PocketMine-MP
Language: php
Custom server software for Minecraft: Bedrock, built from scratch in PHP, C and C++

ns0:entry.ns0:title: pterodactyl/panel
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/pterodactyl/panel
Language: php
Pterodactyl® is a free, open-source game server management panel built with PHP, React, and Go. Designed with security in mind, Pterodactyl runs all game servers in isolated Docker containers while exposing a beautiful and intuitive UI to end users.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: woocommerce/woocommerce
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/woocommerce/woocommerce
Language: php
A customizable, open-source ecommerce platform built on WordPress. Build any commerce solution you can imagine.
